contact_points.description: Outer side surface of the cap (grip area)
contact_points.usage: Primary grasp point to pick and manipulate the cap.

frame_hint.note: For grasp, represent approach using +z of CONTACT.

functional_points.usage: Used when aligning and seating the cap onto the bottle opening. Tightening/loosening is a separate motion after seating.

policy.align: Use a TILT rotation (ω) about an axis perpendicular to the insertion_axis (choose one from tilt_axes_candidates).
policy.seat: Use translation (v) along approach_axis to seat/place.
policy.tighten_or_loosen: Only if task explicitly says tighten/loosen: rotate (ω) about spin_axis.

frame_hint.note: Alignment changes the insertion axis direction (tilt). Spinning around the insertion axis does not help alignment; use spin only for tightening/loosening.
